warnings: Time-to-explain values are observed estimates from drill items; they are not authority commitments.
Where drill items are missing or incomplete, the value remains unknown — never substituted with 0.
failure_prevented: Operators reporting 'we can debug fast' without measured drill evidence — leaving slow paths invisible.
signal_improved: Per-drill estimated minutes and answer_completeness are surfaced alongside the canonical six debug questions.

time_to_explain_entries.next_recommended_input: Complete what_remains_unknown answer for DRILL-EVL-COVERAGE-GAP-001 by adding REP per-dimension evidence.
